meta.title: The Air Force plans to buy 200 new stealth fighters and more
meta.description:
According to Air Force Secretary Frank Kendall, the Air Force intends to buy 200 new fighters from the Next Generation Air Dominance (NGAD) program, alongside 1,000 new drone wingmen. 
#shorts #airpower #drone #drones #ngad #stealth #stealthfighter #airforce
